title: In Parliament | Lee Dillon MP
meta_description: Explore Lee Dillon’s work in Parliament, championing Newbury’s interests on key issues like healthcare, housing, and infrastructure, and advocating for positive change.
headings: h2: You can stay updated about my work in Parliament through this link, where you'll find details of my voting record, Early Day Motions (EDMs) I've supported, and other parliamentary activity. It’s a transparent way for constituents to see how I’m representing Newbury on key issues and advocating for our community in Westminster. https://members.parliament.uk/member/5310
